review_title: swiss army knife with valuable services and APIs
description: Overall, I will continue using the service as it provides good value for the price paid and the multitude of APIs and services available using a single credit account.
author: ILYAS K.
pros: The API and the services provided were straightforward to get started with. Multiple services are provided using one API key to interact with all of them. The services provided are very useful and valuable for my day-to-day work.
cons: Some endpoints are a little bit slower compared to other alternatives. The dashboard needs to be more responsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable and Efficient API for Data Enrichment
description: Piloterr has been a great tool for automating data collection and enrichment. The platform offers a wide range of APIs, and the support team is helpful. It’s a great choice for businesses looking to streamline their processes.
author: Sumit C.
pros: Piloterr API is easy to use, well-documented, and provides seamless integration. The LinkedIn profile search and data enrichment features are particularly powerful. The platform is reliable, and the response time is fast.
cons: Limited free credits for testing, especially for APIs that consume higher credits per request.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Raphael J.
pros: Very easy to use, the documentation is very clear. What really surprised me was the support experience. The first time I tested the API for about five minutes without even having time to properly dive into the documentation, and the next day I received an email from the support team pointing me exactly to the relevant parts of the documentation I should look at. Very efficient and proactive support.
cons: So far i didn't encountered any major downsides, maybe at the moment only a limited number of real estate platforms return structured JSON data directly, but i didn't look far into it i might be wrong
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Frequent API breakdown, loss of credit and expires without one can use it
description: Very bad from the beginning, we have paid and used it for 6 months and regularly the API will break down and we consistenly lost money
author: Anand A.
pros: Getting live web data is available and multiple APIs are available
cons: API is constantly broken and end up loosing all the monthly credits as it expires before using. And the usual answer is go use the competition, instead of compensating on credits then it gets expired because their API is broken.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Andrei R.
pros: Wide range of APIs, excellent API documentation with perfect testing possibilities (you could test calls directly from the documentation pages! good trial credits - i.e. it is absolutely easy to test the service) - I was really impressed by this aspect
cons: My main interest was in their Website Technology API, but comparing results with other similar services it looks I was getting less insights than I was expecting. From another side I am not sure that other services results are 100% correct...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Excellent. Fast API. Responsive customer service.
author: John P.
pros: The data is very accurate and up-to-date. Scraped LI posts, and got a great fill rate. API is simple to use, documentation is clear.
cons: Only issue is that the Advanced Linkedin endpoint is 10 credits, others are 1. But no big deal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy and fast, ready to use, great support
description: Straightforward, as mentioned above, the api libraries allow to get what we want quickly. Also, there is a lot of support from the community which is great valu.
author: Alexandre D.
pros: I really like the simplicity and the documentation. There are plenty of resources, and you can find specific pre-built scrapper in the API library.
cons: I am an individual and the subscription price can be a bit expensive. Though I can understand the focus is on b2b.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Piloterr makes live data extraction simple, fast, and reliable
description: Loved the API docs, fast implementation, and great support! The documentation is clear and beginner-friendly, the response times are impressive, and the customer support team is always available to help when needed.
author: Eishan D.
pros: I like that it is fast, reliable, and consistently gives me accurate data. The API is easy to integrate, performs really well under load, and saves me a lot of time when extracting live data.
cons: I think the rate limits can sometimes be a limiting factor depending on the project scope. While it works great for smaller to medium-scale use cases, scaling up to larger projects makes it a limiting factor.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Very satisfying service, the documentation is very usefull and perfect for consuming an api on few minutes only.
author: Kevin G.
pros: This service is very easy to setup. The documentation is clear and complete. I've plugged my code in less than 5 minutes.
cons: The pricing seems fine tunned foe a professional use, but imo a personal plan is missing for little projects.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I combined Piloterr's services with n8n to create a scraping automation that I then resell to professional clients
author: Thomas P.
pros: documentation and customer service. I was able to find useful information and receive prompt assistance via email.
cons: I haven't entered any negative points yet. The documentation is well done, making it easy to find configurations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Tres simple à utiliser pour le Scrap facile avec n8n
author: Franck P.
pros: Support en français rapide et efficace pour le Scrap facile avec n8n
cons: Pas de promo code pour le Scrap facile avec n8n
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: S'intègre très bien dans mes workflow de production n8n / Postgres et permt la récupération complète d'infos.
author: Jean-Michel -.
pros: L'accès complet au scrapping de LinkedIn La facilité d'intégration avec n8n La complétude des infos collectées
cons: La prise en main initiale de l'API, pas très user friendly Le manque d'API pour Indeed et jobteaser.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Amazing experience. The API is well-documented and I was able to easily integrate into my app.
author: Michael P.
pros: We loved Piloterr API's affordability, quality of data, and the how responsive the API was.
cons: Our least favorite thing about Piloterr API is that the credit balance doesn't rollover each month.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Adam L.
pros: easy to use; very clear instructions/documentations on api tools such as instagram, linkedin, etc.
cons: lack of some social media platforms like facebook and x (twitter)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: its good, simple and delivers whats required, and im recommending it for the company i am working with on their project. hopefully they accept.
author: djemai A.
pros: 1. ease of use 2. assistant AI with docs 3. gathering all data sources in one place 4. saves time rather then manual scrapping or fighting with other scrapping tools
cons: 1. the docs doesnt have some specific and varied examples regarding certain dataset ( leboncoin ), however ai assistant helped me with that. 2. i made a api key. but took me sometime to realize that it expired. there should be a notification note : other then that all is good
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: My overall experience with Piloterr has been exceptionally positive, marked by user-friendly navigation, comprehensive resources, and responsive customer support that made my journey seamless and enjoyable.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to integrate with other apps- One of the standout features of Piloterr is its user-friendly interface. As someone who doesn't have a strong technical background, I found it incredibly easy to navigate. The platform allows users to extract data without any coding knowledge, which is a huge plus for beginners like me. The comprehensive documentation provided was also very helpful in getting me started quickly.
cons: While my experience with Piloterr has been largely positive, there are a few aspects that I believe could be improved. I found that the more advanced features have a bit of a learning curve
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Dilara C.
pros: Easy to use. There are comprehensive tutorials online, and exactly for my purposes, too.
cons: I think it is a bit expensive for what I need it to do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and fast ROI
description: Very good, easy to take in hand fast and address problem in less than a hour. You can build an outbound sales machines thanks to the linkedin API
author: Hugo S.
pros: Easy to use, trustable, output data structure easy to transforme
cons: Sometimes services down (crunchbase founding round extract recently), maybe add an "API status" page
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It has a great selection of APIs for many business cases
cons: Speed can be improved, but all is well so far!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Alexei C.
pros: I loved how simple it was to integrate and the clear documentation that made using the API fast and straightforward.
cons: I found the rate limits somewhat restrictive when handling high-volume requests.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Does what it should, many integrations.
description: Working smoothly. Hope to try more scraper integrations.
author: Duy D.
pros: Seamless to integrate, many use cases. Nice UI/UX
cons: Limited credits to test services, difficult to test
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Pierre J.
pros: I really like the extensive API catalog and the ease of use they offer.
cons: Nothing to declare in particular, the APIs are easy to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We created an enrichment automation very quickly, making it possible to scale the enrichment of all our CRM companies at a price much cheaper than all the current tools.
author: Théo B.
pros: Piloterr is a great solution for scaling enrichment at low cost ! Documentation is well made and the API logs are clear !
cons: Nothing to mention so far, it answers our needs for now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, it was easy to get started, and it has been working well.
author: Husnain J.
pros: - Allows scraping various sites - Good pricing - Decent speed - Well-documented - Responsive support In my initial testing, it has shown a better success rate for LinkedIn scraping versus another service. Hence, planning to keep using Piloterr.
cons: As far as I know, there is no support for webhooks yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best quality / pricing LinkedIn API endpoint
author: Johary R.
pros: Variety of API endpoint, simplicity of use and unbeatable pricing
cons: Reliability sometimes for the Get LinkedIn Profile Info endpoint. But all the others endpoint work very well
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
